highlights.description: New `omniskill/github/` package with GitHub skill for AI agents
MkDocs documentation site with comprehensive guides

added.description: 10 tools: list_issues, get_issue, create_issue, update_issue, add_issue_comment, list_pull_requests, get_pull_request, add_pull_request_comment, search_code, search_issues
GitHub Enterprise support for skill via `BaseURL` config

documentation.description: MkDocs site with Material theme and PlexusOne navigation
Storage provider documentation (overview, configuration, batch operations)
Skills documentation (overview, GitHub skill with tool reference)
Update README as landing page for both packages

highlights.description: Restructured to match omni-aws and omni-google patterns with omnistorage/ subdirectory

breaking.description: Move backend to `omnistorage/backend/` subdirectory to match other omni-* repos

highlights.description: Restructured as root-level Go module for simpler imports

breaking.description: Move backend from `omnistorage/` to root directory

documentation.description: Update README for root-level module with new import paths
Update README shields for plexusone organization
Add icons to README features section

infrastructure.description: Update CI workflows for root-level module (remove working-directory)
Rename workflows to use shared workflow naming
Update workflows to use shared workflow files

changed.description: Refactor path validation and normalization to use `gogithub/pathutil`

highlights.description: Initial release with GitHub repository backend for OmniStorage

added.description: Read files via GitHub Contents API
Write files with automatic commit creation
Batch commits via Git Trees and Commits API for atomic multi-file operations
Delete files with automatic commit creation
List files via GitHub Trees API with prefix filtering
File metadata (size, SHA1 hash) via Stat
GitHub Enterprise support via custom BaseURL/UploadURL

documentation.description: README.md with usage examples, batch API, and configuration reference
GoDoc comments on all public APIs

tests.description: Unit tests for path validation and normalization
Integration tests for backend operations (requires GITHUB_TOKEN)
